title: Murder at the Baskervilles
writer: Arthur Conan Doyle, Arthur Macrae, H. Fowler Mear
actors: Arthur Wontner, Ian Fleming, Lyn Harding
plot: Sherlock Holmes takes a vacation and visits his old friend Sir Henry Baskerville. His vacation ends when he suddenly finds himself in the middle of a double-murder mystery. Now he's got to find Professor Moriarty and the horse Sil...
